hero.label: 🌱 Indonesian Farm Produce · Exported Worldwide
hero.deskripsi: High-quality fruits and farm produce from local Indonesian farmers, exported with cold-chain precision to global markets.
hero.altGambar: A lush tropical garden at golden sunset

dipercaya.label: Trusted by importers across ASEAN countries

produk.label: Premium Indonesian Farm Produce
produk.judul: Three flagship products. One quality standard.
produk.deskripsi: Straight from local Indonesian farms to the global market. Harvested, processed, and packed to a consistent, trusted international export standard.

pisang.alt: A bunch of freshly harvested raw green bananas
pisang.judul: Firm, green, built for long journeys
pisang.deskripsi: Harvested at 75–80% maturity so they stay firm through three weeks at sea and ripen perfectly upon arrival.

kelengkeng.alt: A cluster of fresh longan fruit
kelengkeng.deskripsi: Clear white flesh with deep sweetness; shelf life extended through rapid post-harvest cooling.
kelengkeng.poin2: 4 hours from field to cold room

singkong.alt: Peeled, cut, and neatly packed Indonesian cassava
singkong.judul: Indonesian farm produce, ready as raw material
singkong.deskripsi: Premium cassava from local Indonesian farmers, processed directly at our facility to export standards. Cleanly peeled, hygienically washed, cut to specification, and neatly packed for immediate use in food production.
singkong.poin2: Peeled, washed, and cut at our facility
singkong.poin3: Hygienically packed, ready to use raw material

proses.label: From Farm to Destination Port
proses.deskripsi: Every shipment goes through the same five stages, nothing skipped, nothing compromised.

langkah1.deskripsi: Manually harvested by trained teams at 75–80% maturity ripe enough for quality flavor, firm enough for a three-week sea voyage.

langkah2.deskripsi: Every bunch is sorted, washed, and dimension-checked. Anything that doesn't meet standard is set aside here, not on the ship or at the destination port.

langkah3.deskripsi: Pre-cooled within 4 hours of harvest. Stored at 13.5°C and continuously monitored until the container is ready to depart.

langkah4.deskripsi: Customs documents, phytosanitary certificates, and certificates of origin are fully prepared. Containers are sealed, logged, and ready to sail.

langkah5.deskripsi: Delivered to your port on schedule. Full lot-level traceability is available, from the original farm block to final receipt.

mengapa.label: Why B-Harvest
mengapa.judul: Quality you don't just have to take our word for.
mengapa.kartu1Teks: Global G.A.P., HACCP, and phytosanitary documents accompany every shipment, not just the first one.
mengapa.kartu2Judul: A schedule you can rely on
mengapa.kartu2Teks: Weekly departure slots are booked well in advance, so your inventory planning doesn't depend on our harvest season.
mengapa.kartu3Judul: Straight from the farm, no middlemen
mengapa.kartu3Teks: We work directly with partner farms, meaning more competitive pricing and full visibility into product origin.
mengapa.kartu4Teks: Standardized grading criteria ensure the carton you receive in March is exactly the same as the one shipped in October.
mengapa.kartu5Teks: Track every container from packhouse to port with lot-level documentation on request.
mengapa.kartu6Teks: Every buyer gets a dedicated export coordinator, not a ticket queue.

galeri.judul: This is where it all begins.
galeri.alt1: A sweep of tropical crops under a blue sky

testimoni.label: Global Buyer Testimonials
testimoni.judul: Trusted by importers across ASEAN countries.
testimoni.deskripsi: What our buyers say about the quality of our Indonesian farm produce, shipment consistency, and B-Harvest's professional service.
testimoni.kutipan1: Three years of ordering, and the firmness of the fruit on arrival has never once been inconsistent. That's the core of this business relationship.
testimoni.kutipan2: Their longan Brix score is the most consistent of any Southeast Asian exporter we've ever tested.
testimoni.kutipan3: We shifted our entire green banana program to them after one trial container. The documentation alone saved us weeks of customs processing.
testimoni.kutipan4: Their processed cassava is perfect for our food industry needs. Already peeled, clean, and ready to use immediately. Our production cost efficiency improved by 30%.
testimoni.kutipan5: High-quality Indonesian farm produce. Neat packaging, complete documentation, and responsive customer service. Our best partner in Asia.
testimoni.kutipan6: Trust in every shipment is key. They've never sent us a product that fell short of standard. The consistency of their produce quality is remarkable.
testimoni.kutipan7: Straight from the farm to the buyer's hands with perfect precision. Their cold chain keeps produce exclusively fresh. Highly recommended!
testimoni.kutipan8: The Indonesian farm produce we receive is always in prime condition. Professional local Indonesian farmers, managed by a trustworthy B-Harvest.

kontak.label: Contact the Export Team
kontak.judul: Tell us your volume. We'll handle the rest.
kontak.deskripsi: Send us the details of your needs and our export team will respond within one business day with a price quote and the nearest shipping schedule.

form.pesanSukses: Thank you. Your request has been sent. We'll contact you within one business day.

footer.deskripsi: Premium green bananas and longan, grown across Indonesia and exported with cold-chain precision to buyers in ASEAN countries.
